name: Orange Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1.5+ cups Arrowhead Mills pancake mix (buckwheat, whole wheat, multigrain, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pancake mix, no-fat milk or water, orange juice, egg whites, orange extract, and orange zest in a bowl until combined to your preferred consistency.
2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and lightly coat with pam spray.
3. Pour batter onto the skillet, using about 1/4 cup per pancake for a crepe-style thickness.
4. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes and the edges start to dry out (about 2-3 minutes).
5. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until golden brown.
6. Serve with low-fat pie fillings, Cool Whip, or enjoy plain.
Warnings:
Do not overmix the batter. Do not overcrowd the skillet when cooking the pancakes. Turn off the heat when finished cooking.
